title: Vitalé wellness Reel: clean a captured talking-head into platform-ready 9:16 Reel, 9:16 Short and 1:1 feed cuts — speech-cleanup, quick-cut highlight, multi-platform resize
one_line_ask: Take Vitalé Labs' raw single-take wellness talking-head, clean the noisy on-camera speech, auto-cut it into a punchy highlight sizzle at a target duration, then export platform-ready 9:16 Reel, 9:16 Short and 1:1 feed versions plus a caption/transcript note.

assets.name: vitale_genobalance_raw_take.mp4

issues: Some text on the bottles in the background is blurry and not fully legible, but this is plausible for a real-world photo due to depth of field.
No obvious signs of AI artifacts or incoherence.

assets.note: Migrated to Seedance 2.0 (t2v, latest/best quality) on 2026-07-09; 16:9 1920x1080, ~5s, silent. Prompt = the spec talking-head scene with a hard anti-brand constraint. Preview-frame judgment: scene-correct (calm ~40s nutrition scientist in white lab coat over charcoal knit top at a light-wood desk, out-of-focus shelf of amber/white supplement bottles behind, soft window daylight, static-tripod handheld-YouTube feel) and brand-clean — every bottle label is blank/unbranded, no logos or trademarks on clothing/objects, no screens/devices; face and clasped hands coherent with no melting; photorealistic, not CGI. First 2.0 t2v attempt passed clean, so no anti-brand retry or 1.0-Pro fallback was needed. The brief's raw clip is ~40s; this is raw source footage the task reframes/cleans, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track). NOTE: qc.panel scores below are from the prior seedance-1.0-pro take and are superseded by this 2.0 migration.
